summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DataEntry Hub - all core functionality working. Backend APIs fully functional (23/23 tests passed). Frontend tested successfully including user registration, branch/customer management, sales entry, supplier payments, expenses, and dashboard. Ready for enhancements as requested by user.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console
HTML hydration warnings for table elements

action_item_for_main_agent: Current app is fully functional. User requests enhancements: 1) Separate sales entry forms for cash/bank/credit, 2) Enhanced supplier management with credit limits and payment tracking, 3) User access control with roles and branch-specific permissions, 4) Branch-wise online sales tracking. These are feature enhancements, not bug fixes.
